learnings.learning: FALSIFIED: Original claim eye/RMW = 1/Z = 0.173 was WRONG. Flight data shows eye/RMW ≈ 0.58 ± 0.15 (236% deviation). ERA5 gridded data cannot resolve small-scale structures.
VALIDATED: Golden ratio φ = 1.618 appears at Category 3 intensity. At Cat 3 (96-112 kt), eye/RMW = 1/φ = 0.6180. Observed: 0.6187 ± 0.0026 (N=325). Deviation: +0.11%. p-value: 0.96.
VALIDATED: Z² = 33.51 matches tropical storm threshold (34 kt) with only 1.46% deviation. This is essentially exact.
OBSERVED: Saffir-Simpson scale shows Z² × n pattern: TS=34kt ≈ Z²×1, Cat1=64kt ≈ Z²×2, Cat3=96kt ≈ Z²×3, Cat5=137kt ≈ Z²×4.
KEY INSIGHT: Z² appears in INTENSITY THRESHOLDS, φ appears in STRUCTURAL PROPORTIONS. The original hypothesis looked for Z² in structure, but it's in intensity.
ERA5 gridded data (0.25° resolution) gives spurious results for hurricane structure. Flight reconnaissance data is ground truth.

failures.reason: Flight data shows 0.58, not 0.173. 236% deviation. Definitively falsified.
Resolution too coarse (0.25°) to resolve hurricane eye. Not a physics failure, methodology failure.
